info: learn: defaulting self-learning loop on (opt out with learn.disabled: true)
info: learn.enabled promotes VisionSet.Store=true (the learn package depends on internal/store)
warning: could not derive run_id from --research-dir; phase5 dogfood acceptance will refuse to write without it
